objective: Plan and gather requirements for a SAP Fiori-quality UI to display competitor intelligence data gathered by the refactored competitor-intel pipeline.
non_goals: No changes to the crawler/extraction pipeline itself
No new backend infrastructure (Express only, no CAP)
No mobile/responsive design — desktop dashboard only

completed: Session 1: Abstraction Layer — VendorStrategy interface, PpomppuStrategy, extraction modules
Session 2: Crawlee Integration — PlaywrightCrawler, Dataset, JSONL export
Session 3: Vendor Discovery — board scanner, discoverAndEnqueue, --scan-board CLI
Session 4: Tests + Polish — 83 tests green, sqlite-adapter extracted, live Ollama verified
what_exists_backend: lib/competitor-ad-sqlite.ts — SQLite DB at artifacts/competitor-ads/competitor-ads.db with tables: records, vendor_profiles

lib/competitor-intel/types.ts — CompetitorAdRecord type (25 fields: record_id, vendor, author_name, post_url, post_title, posted_at, products[], terms, account_type, region, bundle, promo, conditions, contact, confidence, evidence[], etc.)
scripts/competitor-ads-intel.ts — CLI tool with --scan-board and --input-csv modes
server.ts — NO existing API endpoint serves competitor-ad SQLite data to the frontend
lib/competitorAnalytics.ts — Separate analytics layer (heatmap, author summaries) — already has /api/analytics/competitors endpoint
what_exists_frontend: src/AnalyticsPage.tsx — Tailwind + Recharts competitor EDA dashboard (existing world). Tabs: market, rankings, bot-intel. Heatmap charts, author summary table with BotBadge
src/fiori/pages/FioriOverviewPage.tsx — Example Fiori page with Cards (Scheduler, Observer, BoardStats, PublisherHistory). Pattern: Card + CardHeader + FlexBox + Tag + Text
src/fiori/components/ — Empty directory, ready for new components
src/fiori/README.md — Rules: no Tailwind, use @ui5/webcomponents-react only, follow SAP Fiori guidelines
src/main.tsx — BrowserRouter with /fiori/* nested routes under FioriShell
FIORI.md — Two-worlds architecture doc: src/components/ = Tailwind (stable), src/fiori/ = Fiori (new). Never mix.
gaps: No API endpoint serves CompetitorAdRecord data from SQLite to the frontend
No UI (Fiori or otherwise) displays the extracted competitor ad intelligence
Vendor profiles (listVendorProfiles) not exposed via API
No way to browse/search/filter historical competitor ad records in the UI

data_model.CompetitorAdRecord: record_id, run_id, vendor, author_name, post_url, post_title, posted_at, captured_at, products[], terms, account_type, region, bundle, promo, conditions, contact, notes, confidence, extraction_source, evidence
data_model.AdProduct: name, plan_tier, duration_months, price_krw, price_per_month_krw, constraints
data_model.VendorProfile: vendor_id, author_name, first_seen_post_url, first_seen_at, last_seen_post_url, last_seen_at, total_posts, products[], updated_at

sqlite_tables.records: record_id PK, run_id, vendor, author_name, post_url, post_title, posted_at, captured_at, products_json (JSON array of product names), extraction_source, confidence, created_at
sqlite_tables.vendor_profiles: vendor_id PK, author_name, first_seen_post_url, first_seen_at, last_seen_post_url, last_seen_at, total_posts, products_json, updated_at

existing_api_surface.GET /api/analytics/competitors: Returns CompetitorAnalyticsPayload (heatmap cells, author summaries, gap analysis) — used by AnalyticsPage.tsx
existing_api_surface.GET /api/competitor-stats: Returns CompetitorStat[] from activity logs (different from SQLite competitor-ad records)
existing_api_surface.No endpoint yet for: SQLite records, vendor profiles, product-level data

architecture_context.fiori_pattern: Cards with CardHeader for KPIs, FlexBox with wrap for grid layouts, Tag for status badges, Text for labels. See FioriOverviewPage.tsx for established pattern.

design_considerations: What floorplan fits? Analytical List Page (ALP) seems right — it's for data exploration with KPIs, filters, charts, and a table. FIORI.md maps Analytics → ALP.

Key user stories: (1) See which vendors/competitors are active, (2) Compare pricing across vendors, (3) Browse individual ad records with evidence, (4) Track vendor activity over time, (5) Identify pricing trends/opportunities
Data needs aggregation: products[] is JSON in SQLite — needs parsing for price comparisons
Evidence is rich (HTML excerpts, OCR text, VLM output) — needs a detail view
Consider: should this be a new /fiori/intelligence route, or extend /analytics with a Fiori view?
The existing AnalyticsPage.tsx (Tailwind) already shows heatmap + rankings — the Fiori UI could complement or replace it
SAP Fiori ALP floorplan features: KPI header row, filter bar, chart area, data table with smart pagination, object page for details
next_actions: Research: Read sap-fiori-elements-developer and sap-fiori-designer skills for ALP guidance
Research: Check @ui5/webcomponents-react docs for AnalyticalTable, FilterBar, KPI components
Requirements: Define which data points need API endpoints (records list, vendor profiles, product aggregation)
Design: Sketch the Fiori UI layout — KPI cards, filter bar, data table, detail panel
Plan: Break into sprints — API layer first, then KPI/overview cards, then data table, then detail view
practical_recommendations: Start by reading FIORI.md and src/fiori/README.md to understand the two-worlds constraint
Read src/fiori/pages/FioriOverviewPage.tsx for the established component pattern
The sqlite-adapter.ts is the model for how to add new API endpoints (see server.ts pattern)
Products are stored as JSON in SQLite — the API should parse and flatten them for price comparison queries
Consider a dedicated /api/competitor-intel/* API prefix for the new endpoints
The existing AnalyticsPage.tsx at /analytics is a Tailwind component — don't modify it; build the Fiori version in src/fiori/
